message:
fix: soften binary download failure to allow source fallback

Change download_binaries() from die() (hard exit) to return 1 + warn(),
allowing the installer to fall back to building from source when binary
downloads are not yet available.

Previously, the installer would terminate immediately if a user tried
to install without --from-source. Now it gracefully degrades to source
building, which is the only currently supported installation method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
